column2: I would like to take this opportunity and welcome you as my new client.
If I can be of any further assistance please do not hesitate to
contatct me.
This past year has been very busy for us.  We bought a new house and tried to move in during just one week.  It was tough to do but we
did it!
It was worth the trouble because the house is really nice.
The kids really enjoy the big back yard.
All the best in the Holiday season and a Happy New Year!!!
I am pleased to announce that there have been several recent promotions
within our organization.  Sally Sales has been promoted to VP of
Sales and Marketing, and Don District has been promoted to Regional
Sales Manager reporting to Sally.
The past year has been very rewarding for us, culminating
in the release of many new and improved products.
For a full list of the new offerings please contact the
Sales and Marketing Department.
This letter is to inform you that due to lack of usage by
the client base, the company's 900 technical support
telephone service will be discontinued as of 05/31/91.
The company is happy to annouce the implementation of a new 800
telephone service for Technical Support.  The new number is
(800) 555-2121.  This new service will go into effect 06/01/91.
